commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Protected maintainer-labeled PR changes Linux memory watcher semantics, so a maintainer should decide whether the targeted proof is enough or a Linux gateway soak is required.; Cleared: The diff changes local filesystem watcher logic and tests only; I found no new dependency, workflow, secret, package-resolution, or code-execution supply-chain concern. (sha=6321cf2d4493cb51e1972edf0cc495225715c1d3)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a Linux-specific directory-only fs.watch tree for memory-core directories while keeping file paths on chokidar and expanding watcher configuration tests.

PR surface: Source +244, Tests +138. Total +382 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main routes Linux memory directories through chokidar, and Node/chokidar source supports the per-entry watcher contract described in the linked issue. I did not run a live gateway repro during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer-labeled PR changes Linux memory watcher semantics, so a maintainer should decide whether the targeted proof is enough or a Linux gateway soak is required.
